Name: Average time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average time between Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION and Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average time between Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER and Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average time between Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER and Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average time for Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR grouped by case:BudgetNumber
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR' and the end of case grouped by the last value of case:BudgetNumber

Name: Total time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR in variants that include rejections by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Minimum time between Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR and Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR across all rework loops
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average time it takes Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR after the execution of Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average waiting time to the Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR after a prior approval step (e.g., Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Total time between Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR and the subsequent Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Average time from Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR to the next Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Average time between Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR and Request Payment in cases where the process eventually completes successfully
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Request Payment'

Name: Minimum time for Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR in variants that also contain Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR and the end of the case

Name: Average time between Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION and Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR specifically in high-frequency variants (frequency > 100)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Total time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR in variants that loop back more than once before final approval
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average time between Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR and the next occurrence of Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION'

Name: Average time for Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR when preceded by Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER versus when preceded only by Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Minimum time between Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR and Payment Handled in cases where rejection is followed by eventual completion
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Average time from Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR to Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR in re-submitted traces
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average time between Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR and Declaration REJECTED by MISSING in variants containing both rejection types
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'
